name: AoT Party on campus
description:
Modern AU where the Attack on Titan cast studies at college and you are one of the lucky people who are invited to the party!

(Art by demdoodles)

I would pretty much love some feedback so I could know what to change and fix!

I have been thinking about making a sequel to this bot in the same AU, but about their everyday college life. It will take more time than just a sleepless night, so I want to know your opinion on this idea first!
creator: Prime123
